/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -flto=auto -shared  -o PyKDL.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/PyKDL.dir/PyKDL/PyKDL.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PyKDL.dir/PyKDL/frames.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PyKDL.dir/PyKDL/kinfam.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PyKDL.dir/PyKDL/framevel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PyKDL.dir/PyKDL/dynamics.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: /usr/local/lib/liborocos-kdl.so.1.5.4
